# --- Python Basics ---
__pycache__/
*.py[cod]
*$py.class

# --- Virtual Environments (Crucial) ---
# Ignores the huge folder containing libraries
.venv/
venv/
env/
ENV/

# --- Environment Variables & Secrets ---
# NEVER commit your database passwords to Git
.env
.env.local
secrets.py

# --- PyInstaller / Builds ---
# Generated when you create the .exe file later
*.spec
dist/
build/
*.exe

# --- IDE Settings ---
# Ignores local VS Code / PyCharm settings
.vscode/
.idea/

# --- OS Generated Files ---
.DS_Store
Thumbs.db

# --- Project Specific ---
# If you have a local folder for testing PDF uploads
storage/
temp_downloads/
